assertions.description: The Alchitry Au template schematic has 4 shield connector symbols (B1-B4, lib_id=Alchitry_Au:Alchitry_Shield, value=Alchitry_Shield). These are multi-pin board-to-board connectors but are classified as type='other' rather than 'connector'. The component_types statistics show {other: 4, mounting_hole: 4} with no connectors. The classifier likely fails to identify them as connectors because they use a custom library and a non-standard reference prefix 'B' instead of 'J' or 'P'. These symbols represent the physical expansion port connectors that make the Alchitry Au a development board.
